hero.title: Digital employees that start right away.
hero.description: Six ready-made AI solutions for your business — each tailored to you and built into your workflows.

items.title: Voice Agent
items.summary: A phone assistant that answers around the clock, advises and books appointments.
items.what: The Voice Agent answers every call, understands the request, answers questions, books appointments and, if needed, forwards to the right person — day and night and, on request, in several languages.
items.benefit: No more missed calls and no more missed appointments. Your team is freed from routine calls and can focus on what matters.
items.example: A customer calls in the evening wanting an appointment. The agent checks the calendar, books it, sends the confirmation and logs everything in your customer system — in under a minute.

items.title: Chat Agent
items.summary: A chatbot for your website that advises, recommends and answers instantly.
items.what: The Chat Agent greets visitors on your website, answers questions, recommends the right offer, collects contact details and books appointments — instantly, with no waiting.
items.benefit: Website visitors turn into enquiries. Your customers get help right away, and your team no longer answers every standard question by hand.
items.example: A visitor asks about pricing. The Chat Agent explains the packages, recommends the right one and offers an appointment — the lead is qualified before your team even steps in.

items.title: Social Media Agent
items.summary: Runs your channels: replies to messages and comments and prepares posts.
items.what: The Social Media Agent replies to messages and comments, spots genuine prospects, plans posts and supports your day-to-day community management.
items.benefit: You stay present on your channels without having to be online all the time — and never miss an enquiry.
items.example: Someone comments under a post asking for more info. The agent replies kindly, sends the details by message and flags the hot lead to you.

items.title: Sales & Outreach Agent
items.summary: Finds the right customers, scores them and prepares the personal outreach.
items.what: The Sales Agent researches matching companies, finds the right contacts, scores how well they fit and prepares personal emails and call notes.
items.benefit: Your sales team starts every day with a full list of promising contacts — and spends its time on conversations instead of research.
items.example: Instead of searching for companies for hours, your team opens a ready-made list each morning: matching contacts, a short assessment and a prepared message to send.

items.title: Automation
items.summary: Takes over repetitive tasks and connects your programs with each other.
items.what: We automate repetitive workflows and connect your programs — from email and calendar to your customer system and quotes and invoices. It all runs by itself in the background.
items.benefit: Less copying, fewer mistakes, more time. Tasks that take hours today get done in minutes — reliably and traceably.
items.example: A new form comes in: the customer is created automatically, a confirmation is sent, a quote is generated and everything is filed neatly — without anyone typing a thing.

items.title: Website Creation
items.summary: Modern, fast websites that turn visitors into customers — connected to your agents on request.
items.what: We build modern, fast websites and landing pages that look perfect on phone and computer, get found on Google and turn visitors into customers — connected directly to your AI agents on request.
items.benefit: A professional presence that not only looks great but actively brings in new enquiries — and works seamlessly with your digital employees.
items.example: This website is an example: fast, modern, great on every device — with a contact form that delivers enquiries directly, and room for your chat agent.
features: Fast and easy to find on Google

cta.title: Which product fits you?
cta.description: Let's have a quick chat — together we'll find the right solution.
